title: VO2 Max Calculator
metaTitle: VO2 Max Calculator — Cooper Test & Heart Rate Method
metaDescription: Estimate your VO2 max using the Cooper 12-minute run test or heart rate ratio method. See fitness level, percentile ranking, and what your score means. Free.

inputs.label: Distance Covered
inputs.helpText: Total distance covered during the 12-minute run test

inputs.label: Age
inputs.helpText: Your current age (used to estimate max heart rate as 220 − age)

inputs.label: Resting Heart Rate
inputs.helpText: Your resting heart rate in beats per minute. Measure first thing in the morning before getting out of bed.

outputs.label: Estimated VO2 Max
outputs.description: Your estimated maximal oxygen uptake in mL/kg/min — the gold standard measure of cardiovascular fitness

outputs.label: Fitness Classification
outputs.description: Fitness classification based on your VO2 max score: Poor, Fair, Good, Excellent, or Superior

outputs.label: Population Percentile
outputs.description: Approximate percentile ranking among the general adult population

formulaCitation: Cooper KH. A Means of Assessing Maximal Oxygen Intake. JAMA. 1968;203(3):201-204
formulaSource: Cooper KH. A Means of Assessing Maximal Oxygen Intake. JAMA. 1968;203(3):201-204. Uth N, Sorensen H, Overgaard K, Pedersen PK. Estimation of VO2max from the ratio between HRmax and HRrest. Eur J Appl Physiol. 2004;91(1):111-115.
